zh-CN.title: CopyShelf 发布：macOS 智能剪贴板，重回原生体验
zh-CN.description: CopyShelf 是一款面向 macOS 的智能剪贴板工具，基于 Swift 6 原生开发，提供高密度扫视、顺序粘贴与文本过滤，帮助开发者更快完成高频复制粘贴工作流。
zh-CN.content:
TL;DR: 很多时候，我们不需要一个庞大、自带云同步且常驻上百兆内存的剪贴板应用。我们需要的是一个速度极快、界面几乎隐形、信息密度高且能安全运行在本地的原生工具。CopyShelf 是一款基于 Swift 6 打造的 macOS 专属智能剪贴板，V1 版本主打高密度扫视、顺序粘贴与敏感信息保护，带您重回干净、纯粹的原生效率时代。

🚀 访问官方网站：copyshelf.rbbtsn0w.me

诞生背景：为什么我们依然需要一款更好的剪贴板工具？

如今市面上的剪贴板管理工具并不罕见，从开源的 Maccy 到老牌商业的 Pastebot 和 Paste。然而，在日常开发和高频写作中，现有的选择往往存在两个走向极端的痛点：

  1. “iOS 化”的臃肿与视觉重力：部分现代剪贴板工具为了跨端同步或花哨的卡片动画，引入了过大的圆角、宽裕的 Padding 和高饱和度的开关图标。对于专业用户而言，这不仅降低了“0.5 秒内快速扫视并定位历史项”的效率，还带来了不小的后台内存开销（如部分 Electron 套壳应用）。
  2. 缺乏场景化和格式过滤能力：当我们需要从表单、Excel 中按顺序复制多段文本，再依次粘贴到另一个目标程序中时，频繁在两个应用间反复切换（Alt-Tab）仍然是逃不掉的体力活；或者当我们复制富文本时，总是需要手动通过终端或记事本去清洗多余的排版样式。

CopyShelf 的设计哲学是“让 UI 消失，让效率回归”。它遵循 macOS 生产力工具的经典双栏架构，在确保极致扫视密度的同时，为您提供一系列解决“格式清洗”和“连续流转”的本地实用工具。

如果您同样关注原生工具链和高效率输入体验，也可以延伸阅读：macOS 本地文本转语音（TTS）实践 与 Swift 6.3 experimentalCGen 指南。

V1 核心功能：直击高频工作流

作为 V1 基础对齐版，CopyShelf 优先打磨了高频本地剪贴板场景，不堆砌云端同步和尚未成熟的 AI 功能，确保您在第一天用它替代现有工具时，就能感受到稳健和顺滑。

1. 极速检索与高密度扫视 (High Density Scan)

CopyShelf 的主窗口采用经典的“Sidebar + Content”双栏架构（类似 Finder 和 Xcode 侧边栏）。我们克制地控制了单元格的行高、留白与分隔线，让字体层级感更明确。当您呼出历史列表时，能在 0.5 秒内扫视一整屏多达数十条的历史记录，极其高效。

  • 支持文本、富文本（RTF/HTML）、链接以及图片等基础数据类型的自动捕获。
  • 支持历史项的去重，连续复制相同内容绝不会污染您的历史列表。
  • 用户可以自定义命名列表（Collections），将经常需要重复利用的代码片段、地址或邮箱一键固定（Pin）常驻。

2. 毫秒级呼出与快速粘贴 (Quick Paste Menu)

通过全局快捷键，可在鼠标附近或屏幕中心迅速唤起轻量级的 Quick Paste Menu。支持拼音与关键词快速检索。选中目标项后，只需按下回车或直接松开修饰键即可完成粘贴（Release to Paste），整个过程没有任何视觉噪音与卡顿。

3. 顺序粘贴模式 (Sequential Paste Mode)

对于需要在网页表单或数据库中录入多条数据的场景，CopyShelf 提供了顺序粘贴模式。

  • 您可以一次性复制多段需要录入的内容，它们会自动进入先进先出（FIFO）的顺序队列。
  • 之后，您只需要连续按下粘贴快捷键，系统就会按照复制的顺序依次吐出内容。您无须在两个程序中来回切换，极大地解放了双手。(注：V1 中此队列仅在进程内存中有效，重启后自动清空)

4. 文本过滤器 (Filter Window)

无需手动清洗格式。CopyShelf 拥有独立的过滤窗口，支持对单条剪贴记录应用文本过滤器，并支持一键复用上一次的过滤器配置：

  • 转换为纯文本 (Plain Text)
  • 去除首尾空格与换行 (Trim)
  • 大小写转换 (Uppercase / Lowercase)
  • 添加引用包裹 (Quote Wrap)

5. 零妥协的隐私黑名单

剪贴板安全是专业用户的生命线。CopyShelf 会自动在本地识别黑名单应用，且默认忽略 1Password、Keychain 等钥匙串与密码管理器的后台复制行为，确保您的账号密码绝对不会遗留在历史记录中。同时，当系统未授权辅助功能权限时，应用会自动优雅降级（退回到只往系统剪贴板写回内容的机制），绝不影响系统的安全策略。

技术内核：基于 Swift 6 的原生克制

为了带给您真正贴合 macOS 系统的使用质感，CopyShelf 在底层技术栈上回归纯粹：

  • 纯原生开发：基于 Swift 6 和 AppKit 原生框架打造，拒绝 Electron 等 Web 壳带来的内存怪兽行为，运行时内存仅为常见 commercial 套壳工具的几分之一。
  • 本地优先：所有数据严格保留在您的本地沙盒内，且当前版本不包含任何云同步或外部网络请求，杜绝任何剪贴板泄露风险。
  • 平台要求：专为 macOS 14.0+ 优化，保证了毛玻璃材质（Vibrancy）和全局快捷键注册的最高兼容性。

路线图规划 (Roadmap)

V1 版本专注于为您提供坚实的 Pastebot 替代能力。在接下来的版本迭代中，我们将探索如何让剪贴板“真正理解您的内容与输入场景”：

  • V1.5：引入 Markdown <-> Apple Notes 富文本的智能双向格式转换；加入对阿拉伯语、希伯来语等多语言 RTL 文本方向的方向修正与混排优化。
  • V2：在本地体验足够稳固的前提下，引入跨端同步（iCloud Sync）和 AI 辅助的清洗与总结能力。

🎁 免费版与 Pro 版权益

CopyShelf 采用免费下载 + 内部购买 (IAP) 解锁 Pro 的诚实付费策略：

  • 免费版：支持基础的剪贴历史捕获，最多保留最近 20 条历史记录，可使用 1 个全局快捷键 Show Clipboard。

如果您正在评估工具在真实工作流中的稳定性，也可以参考这篇 Antigravity 中 Chrome 启动失败修复指引 来对比排障与产品演进思路。

👉 马上访问官网下载 CopyShelf macOS 智能剪贴板

感谢每一位支持独立开发的果粉，欢迎在 app 中提交您的建议和 Issue，让我们共同打造最轻量、高效的 macOS 生产力工具！

en.title: CopyShelf Releases: Smart Clipboard for macOS, Bringing Back the Native Experience
en.description: CopyShelf is a smart clipboard tool for macOS, developed natively in Swift 6. It offers high-density scanning, sequential pasting, and text filtering to help developers complete high-frequency copy-and-paste workflows faster.
en.content:
TL;DROften, we don't need a large clipboard application with built-in cloud synchronization and hundreds of megabytes of persistent memory usage. What we need is a...Extremely fast speed, virtually invisible interface, high information density, and can run securely locally.The native tools.CopyShelfIt is a smart clipboard for macOS built on Swift 6. The V1 version focuses on high-density scanning, sequential pasting, and protection of sensitive information, bringing you back to a clean and pure era of native efficiency.

🚀 Visit the official website:copyshelf.rbbtsn0w.me

Background: Why do we still need a better clipboard tool?

Clipboard management tools are readily available today, ranging from open-source Maccy to established commercial tools like Pastebot and Paste. However, in daily development and frequent writing, existing options often suffer from two extreme pain points:

  1. The bloat and visual weight of "iOS-like" designSome modern clipboard tools, in order to achieve cross-platform synchronization or fancy card animations, have introduced excessively rounded corners, ample padding, and highly saturated toggle icons. For professional users, this not only reduces the efficiency of "quickly scanning and locating historical items within 0.5 seconds," but also brings considerable background memory overhead (as seen in some Electron wrapper applications).
  2. Lack of contextualization and format filtering capabilitiesWhen we need to copy multiple text segments sequentially from forms or Excel and then paste them into another target program, frequently switching between the two applications (Alt-Tab) is still an unavoidable chore; or when we copy rich text, we always need to manually clean up unnecessary formatting styles through the terminal or Notepad.

CopyShelf's design philosophy is"Make the UI disappear, and let efficiency return."It follows the classic two-column architecture of macOS productivity tools, ensuring maximum scanning density while providing you with a range of native utilities for "format cleaning" and "continuous flow".

If you are also interested in native toolchains and efficient input experiences, you can also read further:macOS Native Text-to-Speech (TTS) Practice and Swift 6.3 experimentalCGen guide。

V1 Core Functionality: Directly Addressing High-Frequency Workflows

As the V1 basic alignment version, CopyShelf prioritizes high-frequency local clipboard scenarios and avoids piling on cloud synchronization and immature AI features, ensuring that you can experience its robustness and smoothness from the very first day you use it to replace your existing tools.

1. High-speed retrieval and high-density scanning.

CopyShelf's main window uses a classic "Sidebar + Content" two-column architecture (similar to the sidebars of Finder and Xcode). We've carefully controlled the row height, white space, and separators of the cells to make the font hierarchy clearer. When you bring up the history list, you can scan an entire screen of dozens of history records in 0.5 seconds, which is extremely efficient.

  • It supports automatic capture of basic data types such as text, rich text (RTF/HTML), links, and images.
  • It supports deduplication of historical items, so repeatedly copying the same content will never pollute your history list.
  • Users can customize a list of collections to pin frequently reused code snippets, addresses, or email addresses to a permanent location.

2. Millisecond-level menu access and quick paste functionality.

Using global keyboard shortcuts, you can quickly launch a lightweight application near the mouse or in the center of the screen.Quick Paste MenuIt supports quick search using Pinyin and keywords. After selecting the target item, simply press Enter or release the modifier key to complete the paste (Release to Paste). The entire process is free of visual noise and lag.

3. Sequential Paste Mode

For scenarios where multiple data entries need to be entered into a web form or database, CopyShelf provides...Sequential Paste Mode。

  • You can copy multiple pieces of content to be entered at once, and they will automatically enter a first-in-first-out (FIFO) sequential queue.
  • After that, you only need to press the paste shortcut key repeatedly, and the system will output the content in the order you copied it. You don't need to switch back and forth between two programs, greatly freeing up your hands.(Note: In V1, this queue is only valid in the process's memory and will be automatically cleared after a restart.)

4. Text Filter (Filter Window)

No manual format cleaning is required. CopyShelf has a separate filtering window that supports applying text filters to individual clipboard records and allows for one-click reuse of the previous filter configuration.

  • Convert to plain text.
  • Remove leading and trailing spaces and line breaks (Trim)
  • Case conversion (Uppercase / Lowercase)
  • Add a quote wrapper.

5. Zero-compromise privacy blacklist

Clipboard security is a lifeline for professional users. CopyShelf automatically identifies blacklisted applications locally, andBy default, background copying behavior of keychain and password managers such as 1Password and Keychain is ignored.This ensures that your account password is never left in the history. Additionally, when the system does not grant accessibility permissions, the application will automatically and gracefully degrade (reverting to a mechanism that only writes content back to the system clipboard), without affecting the system's security policy.

Technical Core: Native Restraint Based on Swift 6

To deliver a truly macOS-like user experience, CopyShelf returns to simplicity in its underlying technology stack:

  • Pure native development:based on Swift 6Built with the native AppKit framework, it avoids the memory monster behavior of web shells such as Electron, and its runtime memory usage is only a fraction of that of common commercial wrapper tools.
  • Local priorityAll data is strictly kept within your local sandbox, and in the current version.It does not contain any cloud synchronization or external network requests.This eliminates any risk of clipboard leakage.
  • Platform requirementsOptimized specifically for macOS 14.0+, ensuring maximum compatibility with the Vibrancy texture and global shortcut registration.

Roadmap planning

Version 1 focuses on providing you with a robust Pastebot alternative. In future iterations, we will explore how to make the clipboard "truly understand your content and input scenario":

  • V1.5: IntroductionMarkdown <-> Apple Notes Rich TextIntelligent bidirectional format conversion; added support for Arabic, Hebrew and other languages.RTL Text Direction Correction and Blending Optimization。
  • V2Provided the local experience is sufficiently stable, we introduce cross-device synchronization (iCloud Sync) and AI-assisted cleaning and summarizing capabilities.

🎁 Free and Pro Version Benefits

CopyShelf adoptsFree download + in-app purchase (IAP) to unlock ProHonest payment strategy:

  • Free versionSupports basic clipping history capture, retaining only the most recent clipping history.20 itemsHistory can be accessed using a single global shortcut.Show Clipboard。

If you are evaluating the stability of a tool in a real workflow, you can also refer to this article.Antigravity Chrome startup failure fix guideLet's compare troubleshooting and product evolution approaches.

👉 Visit the official website now to download CopyShelf macOS Smart Clipboard.

Thank you to every Apple fan who supports independent development. We welcome your suggestions and issues in the app so we can work together to create the lightest and most efficient macOS productivity tool!
